channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump wraps NATO summit on a positive note, after meeting Zelenskyy
item.description: President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. launches new airstrikes on Iran and Tehran fires back at Gulf Arab states
item.description: The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war.
item.content:encoded:
The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war.

(Image credit: Khalil Hamra)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump threatens Iran as NATO summit wraps
item.description: President Trump threatened more strikes against Iran after saying he believes the ceasefire is dead at the end of the NATO summit.
item.content:encoded: President Trump threatened more strikes against Iran after saying he believes the ceasefire is dead at the end of the NATO summit.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: New U.S. passports with Trump's image are available. Here's how to get (or avoid) one
item.description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.
item.content:encoded:
The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

(Image credit: Michele Kelemen)
item.dc:creator: Michele Kelemen

item.title: The IOC clears the way for Russian athletes to return to Olympic competition
item.description: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

(Image credit: Pavel Bednyakov)
item.dc:creator: Charles Maynes

item.title: Greetings from a Syrian church, infused with a mix of sweet fruit and diverse faiths
item.description: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries, and its services draw from Eastern Orthodox Christian and Sufi customs.
item.content:encoded: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries, and its services draw from Eastern Orthodox Christian and Sufi customs.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Trump says he believes the Iran ceasefire is 'over.' And, IOC lifts Russia's suspension
item.description: Trump said that he believes the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over, but hasn't ruled out talks. And, the International Olympic Committee paves the way for Russian athletes to compete in the 2028 games.
item.content:encoded:
Trump said that he believes the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over, but hasn't ruled out talks. And, the International Olympic Committee paves the way for Russian athletes to compete in the 2028 games.

(Image credit: Win McNamee)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'over' as NATO summit wraps
item.description: President Trump said he believes the current ceasefire with Iran is over following an exchange of attacks between the U.S. and Iran in the latest escalation straining the agreement to end the war.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump said he believes the current ceasefire with Iran is over following an exchange of attacks between the U.S. and Iran in the latest escalation straining the agreement to end the war.

(Image credit: Abdullah Guclu)
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram

item.title: Trump says ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is over
item.description: Speaking to the press from Turkey, President Trump said Wednesday morning that the ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is over. But he didn't rule out talks continuing to end the war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Speaking to the press from Turkey, President Trump said Wednesday morning that the ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is over. But he didn't rule out talks continuing to end the war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: The state of the NATO alliance amid Trump's second term
item.description: Carl Bildt, co-chair of the European Council on Foreign Relations, talks about the ongoing NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, and the state of the alliance during President Trump's second term.
item.content:encoded: Carl Bildt, co-chair of the European Council on Foreign Relations, talks about the ongoing NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, and the state of the alliance during President Trump's second term.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez
